recentArticles.title: Jimmy Kimmel Cries and Calls Adam Carolla His 'Life Partner' at Hollywood Walk of Fame Ceremony - Variety Australia
recentArticles.snippet: # Jimmy Kimmel Cries and Calls Adam Carolla His ‘Life Partner’ at Hollywood Walk of Fame Ceremony: ‘If That Sounds Gay to You, It Was and It Is’. Kimmel began his speech by remembering his first introduction to Carolla, which came in 1994 when the late-night star was working on “Kevin and Bean,” a Los Angeles radio show. The first time Carolla was put on the air, Kimmel recalled his roast; “Adam told ‘Kevin and Bean,’ ‘Jimmy is 160 pounds of pure chiseled steel. And if that sounds gay to you, it was and it is,” he said, to laughter from the audience. “Adam and I, as you probably know, don’t agree much when it comes to politics, but I love him dearly,” said Kimmel. I am proud of him … this is a guy who worked his way up from nothing to become, literally, a millionaire, and if you don’t believe it you’ll hear him say it every single show.”.

recentArticles.title: Drake Beats Michael Jackson's Record for No. 1 Hits - Newser
recentArticles.snippet: # Drake Beats Michael Jackson's Record for No. 1 Hits. Image 1: Newser - Current News - Breaking StoriesImage 2: Newser - Current News - Breaking Stories. Image 46: Drake Beats Michael Jackson's Record for No. 1 Hits. With "Janice STFU" debuting at No. 1 on the Billboard Hot 100, Drake now holds the mark for the most chart-topping singles by a solo male artist, _Variety_ reports. *    Fueled by three new albums released May 15—_Iceman_, _Maid of Honour_, and _Habibti_—Drake also sets a new record for most Hot 100 entries in a single week, landing 42 songs on the chart and surpassing Morgan Wallen's previous high of 37. *    On the albums chart, _Iceman_, _Habibti_, and _Maid of Honour_ opened at Nos. 1, 2, and 3, respectively, with _Iceman_ becoming his 15th No. 1 album and giving him the male solo artist record in that category as well, breaking Jay-Z's record.

Clive, who is famous for his Grammy parties, has battled health issues before ... in February 2021 he was diagnosed with Bell's Palsy. Clive is a HUGE deal in the music biz. recentArticles.title: Drake Breaks Records for Most No. 1s Ever on the Billboard Canadian Hot 100 and Canadian Albums Charts - Billboard Canada
recentArticles.snippet: The Toronto rapper has passed Justin Bieber and Taylor Swift for most ever No. 1 hits on the Canadian Hot 100 with "Janice STFU," while he surpasses Swift and Céline Dion for most No. 1s ever on the Canadian Albums chart. Drake's blockbuster *Iceman* release has broken multiple Billboard Canadian chart records. The same week that he beat Michael Jackson's record for most No. 1s in the U.S. Drake's "Janice STFU" is his 14th No. 1 song on the Billboard Canadian Hot 100 dated May 30. That marks Drake's 14th chart-topping song since the chart’s inception in 2007, and it breaks a tie with Justin Bieber and Taylor Swift for the most No. 1 songs in Canadian Hot 100 history. **Drake’s 14 Canadian Hot 100 No. 1s**. On the Canadian Albums chart, The Boy has debuted at No. 1 *and* No. 2 this week with **Iceman** and **Maid of Honour*.* His other new album, **Habibti*,* ranks at No. 4.

recentArticles.title: Paul McCartney’s New Solo Album Is Worth the Wait — Review - Newsweek
recentArticles.snippet: # Paul McCartney’s New Solo Album Is Worth the Wait — Review. Paul McCartney is back with his first solo album in five years, and it's packed with rock goodness. The release, called "The Boys of Dungeon Lane," features a collection of tracks that play as very personal to the Beatles legend. "'The Boys of Dungeon Lane' is not only the first new solo album from Paul McCartney in over five years; it is a revealing collection of never-before shared stories, personal memories and some newly inspired love songs, from one of the most culturally significant figures of our time," a press statement says of the release. The album is arguably his most personal and introspective to date, untold stories that transport the listener back to where it all began.". ## Album Review — Paul McCartney, 'The Boys of Dungeon Lane'. In honor of the set being out, record stores across the country are hosting "The Boys of Dungeon Lane" indie release parties from May 29 to 31.

recentArticles.title: Jae Stephens Says Her New Single "Attaboy!" Will "Kick You in the Teeth" - Teen Vogue
recentArticles.snippet: The 27-year-old artist talks to Teen Vogue about how the track came to life, managing her growing fame, and leveling up from her self-described "Sellout era.". Fresh off the wave of her viral hit “Afterbody,” the 27-year-old pop and R&B singer is leveling up and introducing her fans, aptly called JaeBaes, to a new era with her single “Attaboy!”. “Literally, all I'm doing after this is going to Goodwill, and then I’m making homemade merch,” Stephens tells *Teen Vogue* at the start of our interview. What new world “Attaboy!” signals for the artist has yet to be revealed, but if this newly created (and high-key cryptic) Instagram account welcoming fans to “Auda City” tells us anything, it’s that she is going all-in on the next phase of Jae Stephens––and inviting listeners into the center of her universe. Ahead of the release of "Attaboy!", *Teen Vogue* spoke with Stephens about how the track came together, her internet presence, and how she’s cultivating her growing pop stardom.

recentArticles.title: Jay McKee Named Hamilton Hammers Head Coach - NHL.com
recentArticles.snippet: # Jay McKee Named Hamilton Hammers Head Coach. The Islanders announced that Jay McKee has been named Head Coach of the Hamilton Hammers, the Islanders' new AHL affiliate. The New York Islanders announced today that Jay McKee has been named Head Coach of the Hamilton Hammers, the Islanders new American Hockey League affiliate. McKee, 48, takes over as the first Head Coach in Hamilton’s history. He has spent the past three years as Head Coach of the Brantford Bulldogs of the Ontario Hockey League. Last season, McKee led the Brantford to the best record in the OHL (48-10-8-2). Prior to his time in with the Bulldogs organization, McKee spent four seasons (2016-17 through 2019-20) as Head Coach of the Kitchener Rangers and the 2015-16 season as Associate Coach in Kitchener. He spent the 2014-15 season as an Assistant Coach with the Erie Otters (OHL), the 2011-12 season as an Assistant Coach of the Rochester Americans (AHL), and the 2010-11 season as an Assistant Coach at Niagara University (NCAA).

recentArticles.title: Kanye West Set to Kick Off Tour in Istanbul, With Fans Expected to Flock From Countries Where He’s Been Banned - Variety Australia
recentArticles.snippet: # Kanye West Set to Kick Off Tour in Istanbul, With Fans Expected to Flock From Countries Where He’s Been Banned. Kanye West is set to hold a massive concert on Saturday at Istanbul’s Atatürk Olympic Stadium, which will kick off his tour following cancellations in the U.K., France, Switzerland and Poland due to the rapper’s antisemitic remarks. Though the U.K. government blocked Ye from entering the country and several other European nations followed, fans are now travelling to Istanbul from the U.K., the U.S., Germany, Poland, Russia and Kazakhstan to catch the concert, according to organiser Erdem Karahan. Besides several Turkish artists who will open the evening — including Sena Sener, Motive, Lvbel C5, Yener Cevik, Mavi, and Pera — Karahan told Turkish media he expects U.S. rapper Travis Scott to be on stage to perform the pair’s collaborative track “Father” from West’s latest album, “Bully.” North West, Kanye West’s daughter with ex-wife Kim Kardashian, is also expected to perform.

recentArticles.title: 2026-05-30 - Billboard Canada
recentArticles.snippet: About UsPrivacy PolicyTerms and ConditionsCareers Contact Us. Billboard is a part of Penske Media Corporation. ## Le jeune auteur-compositeur-interprète Alex Sampson fait son entrée dans le palmarès radio de Billboard Canada avec son titre « Misery ». Cette semaine, la jeune auteure-compositrice-interprète canadienne fait son entrée à la 35e place du palmarès radio de Billboard Canada CHR/Top 40 avec son titre « Misery », daté du 23 mai. L'an dernier, l'artiste signé chez Warner Music Canada a fait son entrée dans les palmarès radio avec « Pretty Baby », une ballade aux accents des années 50. Sans doute le titre phare de **Swag II de Bieber —** qui fait suite à son album à succès **Swag** — la chanson s'ouvre sur une mélodie de guitare entraînante et une instrumentation influencée par le hip-hop, pour se transformer en un morceau lumineux et funky où Bieber déborde de confiance et d'ambition.

recentArticles.title: Harry Styles Wears a Zoë Kravitz Fave for a Night Out With Rosalía - Vogue
recentArticles.snippet: # Harry Styles Wears a Zoë Kravitz Fave for a Night Out With Rosalía. Peer-judged, it’s a night where some of the buzziest emerging and most formidable established artists come together. Styles hopped over the English Channel from his multi-night Together, Together tour residency in Amsterdam for the occasion—already, a history-making, record-breaking event. Styles was a surprise guest, and presented Radiohead frontman Thom Yorke with the highest accolade of the night, the Academy Fellowship. On tour, Harry Styles—styled by Harry Lambert—has been sporting a variety of custom looks in primary colors with fun accessories: a bow-adorned Valentino blazer by his friend Alessandro Michele, a custom blue, orange, yellow combo from Prada and Cartier, and a groovy floral neck-tie and sculptural pants care of Celine. * Listen to *The Run-Through with Vogue*, a weekly podcast featuring the most exciting stories and hot takes from the worlds of culture, politics, sports and–of course–fashion.

recentArticles.title: Scooter Braun vs. the World - The Free Press
recentArticles.snippet: EXCLUSIVE: Scooter Braun Tells His Side of the Taylor Swift Masters War. I spoke to the former mega-manager about working with Kanye West, how management is like parenting, and about being cast as the villain in Taylor Swift’s fairy tale: ‘I legitimately don’t know her.’. ***In case you missed the news, The Free Press has a new culture podcast. It’s called “Second Thought,” and it’s hosted by Suzy Weiss. You might know him as the guy who discovered Justin Bieber, or as the superagent cast as a villain by Taylor Swift, or as Sydney Sweeney’s new squeeze. Braun, who I recently interviewed in Los Angeles for my podcast *Second Thought*, told me he saw explosive talent in the young Bieber—“He was charismatic, he was brave”—and envisioned him as the 21st century’s answer to a young Michael Jackson; a kid, soulfully singing love songs for the masses.

recentArticles.title: Early 2000s star brings first solo album in more than a decade to Oakland - sfchronicle.com
recentArticles.snippet: # Early 2000s star brings first solo album in more than a decade to Oakland. Juvenile is bringing Oakland back to the early 2000s with his forthcoming concert at the Fox Theater. The New Orleans rapper, whose real name is Terius Gray, rose to fame in the late 1990s with hits such as “Slow Motion,” “Back That Azz Up” and “Ha.” He’s widely regarded as a pioneer of Southern hip-hop and contributed to the rise of Cash Money Records, with which he worked both as a solo artist and as part of the collective Hot Boys. Returning to the stage with his first full-length solo project in more than a decade, “Boiling Point,” the musician performs in Oakland on June 5. Zara Irshad is the Chronicle's Arts & Entertainment Engagement Reporter. She joined the Chronicle as a summer 2023 intern for the Datebook team. She previously interned for the San Diego Union-Tribune and wrote for her campus newspaper, the Guardian, where she served as editor-in-chief.

recentArticles.title: Gracie Abrams announces The Look At My Life Tour - The Music Universe
recentArticles.snippet: # Gracie Abrams announces The Look At My Life Tour. Grammy-nominated singer-songwriter, Gracie Abrams, announces her North American and European/UK arena tour, The Look at My Life Tour, with the North American dates presented by Capital One. Promoted by Live Nation, the 64-date tour kicks off in Denver, CO on December 2nd and will hit major cities across North America, including Boston, Chicago, Nashville, Toronto and Los Angeles with four nights at the Kia Forum before wrapping with four nights at the Barclays Center in Brooklyn, NY on March 20th. Gracie will then embark on the European/UK leg beginning April 8th, with three nights in Paris, FR, and will play cities across Europe, including Amsterdam, Dublin, Manchester, and Milan, before wrapping in Barcelona, ES on May 28th. Gracie will also be playing four nights at the iconic O2 in London. Earlier this month, Gracie ushered in a new era with her single “Hit the Wall.” Along with the single release, Abrams also shared the official video directed by Renell Medrano.

recentArticles.title: Sonny Rollins, saxophonist and restless genius of jazz, dead at 95 - Chicago Tribune
recentArticles.snippet: News Obituaries |   Sonny Rollins, saxophonist and restless genius…. # Sonny Rollins, saxophonist and restless genius of jazz, dead at 95. NEW YORK — Sonny Rollins, the tenor saxophonist and restless genius whose bold, distinctive tone and constant experimentation kept him on the cutting edge of jazz for more than 50 years, died Monday at age 95. From his early days as a teen phenom to his more measured solo work and experimentation with free jazz, Rollins was revered for his improvisational skill. He was one of the last living greats of the bebop era and — along with John Coltrane and Charlie Parker — one of the most influential saxophonists of his time. While his early bebop work was the most popular with his fans, Rollins never looked back, saying he found it “excruciating” to even listen to the flaws in his older recordings. “I played a couple of concerts early on where I was out in the open in the afternoon,” He told the New York Times in 2020.
recentArticles.summary: 此新聞報導傳奇爵士薩克斯風手Sonny Rollins逝世，內容與周杰倫無關。

recentArticles.title: John McClain, co-executor of Michael Jackson estate, dies at 71 - Los Angeles Times
recentArticles.snippet: John McClain, a musician and record executive who helped power Janet Jackson’s ascent to pop stardom before serving as a co-executor of the estate of Jackson’s brother Michael, died Tuesday in Los Angeles. In a statement, he described McClain as “one of the great innovators in the world of music and music marketing” and said “it is difficult to imagine a world without him.”. Named to their posts in Michael Jackson’s will, McClain and Branca steered Jackson’s estate from financial and reputational ruin at the time of the pop star’s death in 2009 — much of it due to the multiple allegations of child sexual abuse against the singer — to the enormous success of posthumous projects including the concert film “This Is It,” the Cirque du Soleil production “Michael Jackson One,” the Broadway show “MJ: The Musical” and the Hollywood biopic “Michael,” which opened in movie theaters last month and is already among the highest-grossing biopics ever made.
recentArticles.summary: 此新聞報導關於麥可傑克森遺產共同執行人John McClain的逝世，與周杰倫無直接關聯。

recentArticles.title: From ‘Scream’ to stream: Jamie Kennedy reveals how Hollywood lost its way and why he won't give up on LA - Fox News
recentArticles.snippet: # From ‘Scream’ to stream: Jamie Kennedy reveals how Hollywood lost its way and why he won't give up on LA. ## 'Scream' star says social media 'gave everybody a voice' but 'a lot of people should have laryngitis'. #### Comedian Jamie Kennedy speaks on the 'tail-end' of 'the great wokeness'. Comedian Jamie Kennedy spoke to Fox News Digital about the state of comedy amid a highly polarized political landscape. He told Fox News Digital in an exclusive interview that he was encouraged by what he sees as a return to center for Hollywood, or at least for comedy. Jamie Kennedy sat down with Fox News Digital for an exclusive interview in Los Angeles on May 7, 2026. "We're on the tail and of everyone being upset, so I think the people just don't care anymore, and I think the people are going to come back again," Kennedy said.
recentArticles.summary: 此新聞內容與周杰倫無關，主要探討喜劇演員Jamie Kennedy對好萊塢現狀和喜劇未來的看法。

recentArticles.title: Jackass: Best and Last Stars Confirmed to Attend IGN Live 2026 - IGN Southeast Asia
recentArticles.snippet: # Jackass: Best and Last Stars Confirmed to Attend IGN Live 2026. ### Plus, check out this exclusive new poster for the gang's final movie. The Jackass gang is coming to IGN Live 2026! Steve-O, Wee Man (Jason Acuña), Poopies (Sean McInerney), and Jasper will attend IGN Live on Saturday, June 6th to promote their new movie, Jackass: Best and Last. In addition to this announcement, IGN can also exclusively reveal the new poster for Jackass: Best and Last, which can be seen below. Jackass: Best and Last marks Johnny Knoxville and the gang’s “final fling at the big screen,” according to the movie’s official synopsis:. IGN Live 2026 is a multi-day celebration of video games and entertainment that will take place at the Magic Box @ The Reef in downtown Los Angeles on June 6 - 7 from 9 am - 5 pm PT.
recentArticles.summary: 此新聞報導《蠢蛋搞怪秀》成員將出席IGN Live 2026宣傳新電影，內容與周杰倫無關。

recentArticles.title: Jay Chaudhry, Zscaler CEO: Fortt Knox Earnings - CNBC
recentArticles.snippet: # Jay Chaudhry, Zscaler CEO: Fortt Knox Earnings. Zscaler CEO Jay Chaudhry told Jon Fortt the stock's ~30% post-earnings plunge is a buying opportunity, defending a Q3 that beat: revenue and ARR each up 25%, a record 23% operating margin, ARR near $3.5B. He called the softer guidance 'prudent' after two sales leaders departed, and said Zscaler is pulling memory and datacenter purchases forward in an AI-driven supply crunch to secure billions of coming AI agents – pressuring free cash flow. Memory stocks can go higher but Nvidia may be a warning sign for Micron: Deepwater's Gene Munster. Consumers are being 'highly selective' on what they want, says TD Cowen’s Oliver Chen. Jamie Dimon says JPMorgan Chase could spend $20 billion on acquisition. Watch CNBC's full interview with former CFTC Chair Gary Gensler. Former CFTC Chair Gary Gensler on regulating prediction markets.
recentArticles.summary: 此新聞報導關於資安公司Zscaler執行長Jay Chaudhry的財報分析，與周杰倫無關。

recentArticles.title: Self-Help Podcaster Jay Shetty Strikes Major $100 Million Deal With Spotify And Netflix - Yahoo
recentArticles.snippet: ## Entertainment:. * Behind the scenes at the AMAs. * Gen Z icon Geena Davis. * Sonny Rollins dies at 95. * Cannes Palme d'Or winner. # Self-Help Podcaster Jay Shetty Strikes Major $100 Million Deal With Spotify And Netflix. Add Yahoo as a preferred source to see more of our stories on Google. ## Topline. Spotify and Netflix struck a deal reportedly worth $100 million for exclusive rights to the video version of “On Purpose,” a self-help podcast hosted by wellness influencer Jay Shetty, a rare nine-figure podcasting contract that is one of Spotify’s biggest since it first signed with Joe Rogan in 2020. ## Key Facts. *This is a developing story. *This article was originally published on Forbes.com*.
recentArticles.summary: 此新聞報導知名自我成長播客Jay Shetty與Spotify和Netflix簽下價值一億美元的獨家合作協議，與周杰倫無直接關聯。

recentArticles.title: Miles Davis at 100: Musicians explain why he is the GOAT - Los Angeles Times
recentArticles.snippet: # Miles Davis at 100: Musicians explain why he is the GOAT. * Beyond his trumpet, Davis’ style, swagger and uncompromising attitude made him a model of artistic courage, with admirers saying he created a new language — and a blueprint for fearless reinvention. Still possessor of the biggest-selling jazz record in history, “Kind of Blue,” Davis casts a huge influence over the whole music world for his uncompromising artistic vision, constant evolution, style and more. In honor of Davis’ centennial, The Times spoke to an array of notable artists from all walks of music, some who knew and played with him, some fans of the man, but all agreed, Miles Davis was and is a singular force in music, an artist like no other in his vision, passion and feeling for the music. **Bilal, singer:** If you play the music you’ve got to look the part, and it was almost like he got into a movie role or something like that.
recentArticles.summary: 此新聞報導主要探討爵士樂傳奇人物Miles Davis的音樂影響力與藝術成就，內容未提及周杰倫。
